description: Makes row and column labels unique
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## UniquifyLabels GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
UniquifyLabels is a GenePattern module that Makes row and column labels unique

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, output.file, make.row.labels.unique, make.column.labels.unique
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>UniquifyLabels.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.modules.unique.Unique <input.filename> <output.file> <make.row.labels.unique> <make.column.labels.unique>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: make.row.labels.unique
parameters.description: whether to make the row labels unique

parameters.name: make.column.labels.unique
parameters.description: whether to make the column labels unique
